# ArtUs Academy

> ArtUs Academy is a leading technology and digital career training institute in Kakkanad, Kochi, Kerala, offering hands-on, project-based courses with expert mentorship and job placement support.

## Core Courses
- [Full Stack Web Development](/courses/web-development): A 6-month comprehensive coding bootcamp covering Frontend (HTML, CSS, JS, React, Tailwind, shadcn) and Backend (Java, OOP, MySQL, Spring Boot, REST APIs, Git). Includes placement assistance, mock interviews, and EMI options.
- [Professional Digital Marketing](/courses/digital-marketing): A 4-month practical growth marketing program covering SEO, SEM (Google Ads), SMM (Facebook/Instagram), content strategy, WordPress, Google Search Console, and Analytics with live client projects.

## Key Information
- **Location**: 3rd Floor, SF Arcade Building, Kunnumpuram, Kakkanad, Kochi, Kerala - 682030
- **Phone**: +91 7034 3535 96
- **Email**: info@artusacademy.com
- **Website**: https://artusacademy.com
- **Training Mode**: Both Online and Offline classes available.
- **Affiliation**: In collaboration with ArtUs Brand (digital marketing agency).

## Navigation & Resources
- [Home Page](https://artusacademy.com/): Official homepage.
- [About Us](https://artusacademy.com/about): Mission, vision, and team story.
- [All Courses](https://artusacademy.com/courses): Course listings and options.
- [Blogs](https://artusacademy.com/blogs): Technical and marketing articles.
- [Careers](https://artusacademy.com/careers): Job opportunities at ArtUs Academy.
- [Contact Us](https://artusacademy.com/contact): Inquiries and support details.
- [Full LLM Index](/llms-full.txt): Detailed syllabus, mentors, and FAQs for LLMs.
